CustomField.description:
NOTE: We are no longer using this field. It was including utilities in the 3x rent calculation, which was incorrect. Since it is not an AA rule and not a high priority, we unchecked all fields and removed form the layout. We may add back in the future if we have time to correct the calculation.
If this box is checked, an applicant's monthly income must be at least three times the effective rent of this home (hardship waivers will not be considered). Default: No.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this box is checked, an applicant's monthly income must be at least three times the effective rent of this home (hardship waivers will not be considered). Default: No.
CustomField.label: 3x Rent Requirement
